title: CategoryTypeAttribute
description:
CategoryTypeAttribute: Attribute that defines Revit category type as defined in Visibility & Graphics window.
Allowed values of Type property are: 'Model', 'Annotation', 'Analytical' and 'Internal'.
Each category added to Category needs to have CategoryTypeAttribute assigned to be successfully reflected.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
